title: Quanqiu Gao Wu
synopsis:
28-year-old Fang Ping is unexpectedly reborn in a parallel world in 2008, returning to his 18-year-old high school self. This is a world built upon a martial arts system, where martial artists possess extremely high social status and power. Due to a coincidence in his previous life as the War Emperor, Fang Ping's body is imbued with a martial arts system. He can convert rare items of any value into martial arts points, allowing him to enhance his bones, meridians, physical body, blood and qi, and mental strength at an extraordinary speed. Through the system's cheat-like abilities and his own intellect, Fang Ping successfully enters the Modu Martial Arts University for further studies, continuously growing and maturing over the years. Faced with unknown challenges, he gradually realizes the responsibilities a martial artist must bear and the mission to protect family, friendship, and love.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
